channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Loose bolts along cyclepath line, 11th May
item.description:
3 loose bolts on the cyclepath white separator sticking up, just after the bus stop if walking towards greyhound gardens junction (246/248 house numbers on oppostie side of road) . Unluckily my child managed to trip and fall on one of these and cut her knee. A lot of children walk along there and cycle and I do not wish for this to happen to anyone else. Not sure how long issue has been present and understand you must have a long list of things to fix but if you can please make this one of the priorties, that would be much appreciated! Thanks so much.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucestershire Cycle Spine, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Yellow lines, 11th May
item.description:
The double yellow lines are faded on both all the corners of the street in the area and no signs to say don't park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Charles Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary traffic lights, 11th May
item.description:
Temporary traffic lights are causing traffic queues on Shurdington Rd heading towards Cheltenham. The timing isn’t in unison with the fixed traffic lights further down the road or switching regularly enough and the result is bottlenecks. Effectively more traffic is leaving Cheltenham via these traffic lights than is allowed into Cheltenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104, Shurdington Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles

item.title: Overhanging tree, 11th May
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 11th May
item.description:
Please could you jet the gully in the edge of the carriageway
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 11th May
item.description:
Damaged street sign name visability with lose post
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 11th May
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 400x400x40mm plus x3 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 11th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please lift and relay x1 raised rocking 600x500x18mm slab (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sightlines need mowing, 10th May
item.description:
Near Kilkenny Inn is the location. Cowparsley so high you cannot see traffic coming from Frogmill on A436 at the junction for Amdoversford top entrance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A436, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: School speed restriction sign flashing all night, 10th May
item.description:
School speed restriction sign outside Playhouse nursery on Hatherley road flashing all night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 287, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign isn't working correctly (part only or random activation)

item.title: Verges are overgrown and visibility at junction is now dangerous, 10th May
item.description:
Either side of the north road at the crossroads, with a436, heading from Withington to andoversford.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long grass reduces visibility at exit from Malleson Road onto A435, 10th May
item.description:
At the junction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malleson Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous footpath, narrow, edge falling away, barrier missing, 10th May
item.description:
Footpath alongside a stream next to 94 Shurdington Road. My son is in hospital after quite a nasty accident there, that could easily have been very serious or even fatal. This needs immediate (not just a suggestion, this is a non-negotiable request for immediate attention) action to address the clearly dangerous state of the path. I’m informed this path has been complained about for a long period of time several years), but no action has resulted.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Shurdington Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alley way by the side of Emmanuel Church street light No 1, 10th May
item.description:
The alley way which runs from Fairfield Walk to Naunton Way, along the side of Emmuanuel Chruch, light No1 is not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Emmanuel Gardens, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on top of pedestrian crossing button, 10th May
item.description:
The pedestrian crossing button close to Gloucestershire College

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cassin Drive, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double yellow lines missing there's, 10th May
item.description:
There's a gap in the paint perhaps when road was resurfaced.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Everest Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sexual graffiti on road surface, 10th May
item.description:
Graffiti of penis and also 'Hello' painted on road surface. On left hand side of the Reddings close to the junction approaching Badgeworth Lane. It has been there a few weeks. I had hoped this would wash off with rain or wear off, but it hasn't. May not be noticeable if you are in a vehicle, but as a pedestrian it is very obvious!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Reddings, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling point is overflowing, 10th May
item.description:
Coronation square recycling point in coronation square car park. Recycled items are overflowing - looks to be many weeks worth uncollected. Please give us appropriate space to recycle in Cheltenham.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed limit sign on north side of road is missing, sign on south side obscured by undergrowth., 10th May
item.description:
Located Bishops Cleeve side of Harper Crewe development, nearest postcode GL52 7RU, What3words approximately jukebox.fleet.gifted.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is missing (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Chunk of tree fallen, 10th May
item.description:
A large tree branch has fallen off a tree on the verge right by the road outside number 26 at GL516AT. It has been there well over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Farmington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
